name: Crispy Noodle Pancakes with Pork Julienned Ve
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces pork loin, sliced very thinly into sheets
2 tablespoons chicken broth or pork broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles (any type) in boiling salted water for about 3 minutes, then drain and set aside.
2. Topping: Heat oil in a non-stick saute pan. Flatten warm noodles into "pancakes" on the bottom of the pan. The size should suit your family's appetite.
3. While the pancake cooks over low heat, julienne vegetables and slice pork.
4. In another saute pan with a teaspoon of peanut oil, stir fry pork for 1 minute over high heat. Add julienned vegetables and stir fry for another minute or two.
5. Add bean paste, salt, pepper, sugar, and broth to the stir fry. Stir until combined.
6. Dissolve cornstarch in cold water, then add to the stir fry to thicken while cooking thoroughly.
7. Assemble: When the noodle pancake is done and the stir fry is ready, place the "pancake" on a serving plate with half of the stir-fried pork and vegetables on and off the noodles. Garnish with parsley, orange twist, or radish rose, then serve.
